name: agent-awareness
description: Modular awareness plugins that broaden AI agent context with environmental data

interface.shortDescription: Codex bundle for agent-awareness setup and diagnostics
interface.longDescription: Packages Codex-specific assets for agent-awareness. To activate awareness in Codex today, install agent-awareness and run `agent-awareness codex setup`.
defaultPrompt: Explain how to enable agent-awareness in Codex with `agent-awareness codex setup` and verify Codex hook health
